item.description: Internal/Other Changes - Updated bundled Claude CLI to version 2.1.119

- excludeDynamicSections now keeps static auto-memory instructions in the cacheable system-prompt block; only the per-user memory directory path and per-machine environment values are relocated to the first user message - Long-running SDK sessions now reconnect claude.ai-proxied MCP servers after a

- /config settings (theme, editor mode, verbose, etc.) now persist to ~/.claude/settings.json and participate in project/local/policy override precedence - Added prUrlTemplate setting to point the footer PR badge at a custom code-review URL instead of github.com - Added CLAUDECODEHIDECWD environment

item.title: Elevated errors on Sonnet 4.6
item.description: [critical] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: fix: update web app audit dependency
chore: release v10.6.0
docs: add changelog for v10.6.0
fix: update NotebookLM python-dotenv pin
chore: sync contributors after PR 541
feat: add Bulletmind structured bullet skill
item.description: Add Bulletmind for scoped hierarchical bullet formatting with maintainer metadata, limitations, and source-only cleanup.

item.title: Anthropic and NEC collaborate to build Japan’s largest AI engineering workforce
v1.0.105
item.description: What's Changed fix: allow + in branch names (generated by Claude Code EnterWorktree) by @awakia in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1248 New Contributors @awakia made their first contribution in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1248 Full Changelog: https:

item.title: v2.1.119
item.description: What's changed - /config settings (theme, editor mode, verbose, etc.) now persist to ~/.claude/settings.json and participate in project/local/policy override precedence - Added prUrlTemplate setting to point the footer PR badge at a custom code-review URL instead of github.com - Added CLAUDECODEHIDE

item.title: chore: Update CHANGELOG.md
RT @bcherny: We’re resetting usage limits for subscribers. Thank you so much for your feedback and patience!
item.description: RT @bcherny: We’re resetting usage limits for subscribers. Thank you so much for your feedback and patience!

item.description: RT @claudeai: Claude can now connect to more of the apps you use outside of work, including @Tripadvisor, @bookingcom, @resy, @Instacart, @…

item.title: Add quarkus-agent plugin (#1534)
Def worth a listen - claude code team is phenomenal, has been a blast to partner with @_catwu over the years 🙌
item.description: Def worth a listen - claude code team is phenomenal, has been a blast to partner with @_catwu over the years 🙌

item.title: @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.119
item.description: Use Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Claude can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

item.title: Add vanta-mcp-plugin (#1563)
Memory on Claude Managed Agents is now in public beta on the Claude Platform, letting agents learn and improve across different sessions. https://t.co/6DhcXKhrT9
item.description: Memory on Claude Managed Agents is now in public beta on the Claude Platform, letting agents learn and improve across different sessions. https://t.co/6DhcXKhrT9

item.title:
Memory on Claude Managed Agents is now in public beta.
Your agents can now learn from every session, using an intelligence-optimized memory layer that balances performance with flexibility. https://t
item.description:
Memory on Claude Managed Agents is now in public beta.
Your agents can now learn from every session, using an intelligence-optimized memory layer that balances performance with flexibility. https://t.co/P7GjOYPqCz

item.title: v0.97.0
item.description: 0.97.0 (2026-04-23) Full Changelog: v0.96.0...v0.97.0 Features api: CMA Memory public beta (fc30ebe) Bug Fixes api: fix errors in api spec (f946de8) api: restore missing features (72212ab) Performance Improvements client: optimize file structure copying in multipart requests (1f9eed3) Chores

item.title: bedrock-sdk: v0.29.0
item.description: 0.29.0 (2026-04-23) Full Changelog: bedrock-sdk-v0.28.1...bedrock-sdk-v0.29.0 Features bedrock: use auth header for mantle client (866) (aec801a)

item.title: sdk: v0.91.0
item.description: 0.91.0 (2026-04-23) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.90.0...sdk-v0.91.0 Features api: CMA Memory public beta (ddf732f) bedrock: use auth header for mantle client (866) (aec801a) Bug Fixes api: fix errors in api spec (ae10768) api: restore missing features (1a5b47b) Chores internal: more robust bootstr

item.title: telegram: gate /start, /help, /status behind dmPolicy (#894)
item.description: The bot command handlers bypassed access control — they responded to any DM user regardless of dmPolicy, leaking bot presence and contradicting ACCESS.md's "Drop silently. No reply." contract for allowlist mode. Add dmCommandGate() that applies the same disabled/allowlist checks as gate() without t

item.title: Add Apache 2.0 LICENSE to math-olympiad plugin (#868)
item.description: Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

item.title: skill-creator: sync from anthropics/skills (drop ANTHROPIC_API_KEY requirement) (#1523)
item.description: Ports anthropics/skills#547 (b0cbd3d) so this repo matches the upstream skills repo. improve_description.py and run_loop.py now shell out to `claude -p` instead of using the Anthropic SDK directly, so the description optimizer uses the session's existing Claude Code auth and no longer requires a se

item.title: Add zscaler plugin (#1552)
Add data-agent-kit-starter-pack plugin (#1551)
Add atlassian-forge-skills plugin (#1539)
Add apollo plugin (#1538)
Add windsor-ai plugin (#1536)
RT @ClaudeDevs: Over the past month, some of you reported Claude Code's quality had slipped. We investigated, and published a post-mortem o…
item.description: RT @ClaudeDevs: Over the past month, some of you reported Claude Code's quality had slipped. We investigated, and published a post-mortem o…

item.title: Claude can now connect to more of the apps you use outside of work, including @Tripadvisor, @bookingcom, @resy, @Instacart, @Spotify, @audible_com, @AllTrails, @thumbtack, Intuit @turbotax, and more.
item.description: Claude can now connect to more of the apps you use outside of work, including @Tripadvisor, @bookingcom, @resy, @Instacart, @Spotify, @audible_com, @AllTrails, @thumbtack, Intuit @turbotax, and more. https://t.co/SmQcIdwDWi

item.title: fix: point $schema at schemastore.org (URL was 404) (#52239)
item.description: The previous URL never resolved. Points at SchemaStore instead, where the schema is being added (generated from the Zod source in claude-cli-internal). Fixes #9686.

item.title: We’ve been looking into recent reports around Claude Code quality issues, and just published a post-mortem on what we found.
item.description: We’ve been looking into recent reports around Claude Code quality issues, and just published a post-mortem on what we found.

item.title:
Over the past month, some of you reported Claude Code's quality had slipped. We investigated, and published a post-mortem on the three issues we found.
All are fixed in v2.1.116+ and we’ve reset usag
item.description:
Over the past month, some of you reported Claude Code's quality had slipped. We investigated, and published a post-mortem on the three issues we found.
All are fixed in v2.1.116+ and we’ve reset usage limits for all subscribers.

item.title:
Tiny feature, also a bit of a nerdy one: We've added deep links so you can pre-fill new sessions in Chat, Cowork, or Code with a claude:// link.
I like using it for composition in my workflows or add
item.description:
Tiny feature, also a bit of a nerdy one: We've added deep links so you can pre-fill new sessions in Chat, Cowork, or Code with a claude:// link.
I like using it for composition in my workflows or adding "Open in Claude" buttons to other apps. It does require the desktop app.
https://t.co/0rDK5B8aw

item.title: Add Managed Agents memory stores page to claude-api skill (#1014)
item.description: Add shared/managed-agents-memory.md covering the Memory Stores public beta under managed-agents-2026-04-01: object model (memstore_/mem_/ memver_), create + seed, attach via resources[] at session-create time, FUSE mount at /mnt/memory/<store>/, host-side CRUD with create-by-path vs update-by-id, co

item.title: RT @mkratsios47: The U.S. has evidence that foreign entities, primarily in China, are running industrial-scale distillation campaigns to st…
item.description: RT @mkratsios47: The U.S. has evidence that foreign entities, primarily in China, are running industrial-scale distillation campaigns to st…

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: [minor] resolved — We've had an incident between 08:23 PT / 15:23 UTC and 8:35 PT / 15:35 UTC. We have fully recovered.

item.title: Issues with responses using structured outputs on the API
item.description: [none] resolved — We have identified and resolved an issue which resulted in issues with model responses when making use of structured outputs via the Anthropic API between 16:10 UTC on April 22 and 01:59 UTC on April 23. During this period, structured outputs containing some forms of grammar requir

item.title:
Claude Code won a Webby! Thanks to all of our users and customers for the support and love, and for always giving us feedback so that we can continue making the product a little better every day.
htt
item.description:
Claude Code won a Webby! Thanks to all of our users and customers for the support and love, and for always giving us feedback so that we can continue making the product a little better every day.

Open one any time…

item.title: RT @felixrieseberg: We ship new little improvements every single day, but this one was requested so much that I'm tweeting about it: Skip a…
item.description: RT @felixrieseberg: We ship new little improvements every single day, but this one was requested so much that I'm tweeting about it: Skip a…

item.title:
A small feature drop in Cowork: Live Artifacts!
Ask Claude to create a dashboard, report, or deck - and whenever you open it, Claude will refetch data from your Connectors to keep all information up
item.description:
A small feature drop in Cowork: Live Artifacts!
Ask Claude to create a dashboard, report, or deck - and whenever you open it, Claude will refetch data from your Connectors to keep all information up to date. Simple idea, super useful in practice.
Get Claude at https://t.co/hHH7bjSeQj. Simply tell

item.title:
We ship new little improvements every single day, but this one was requested so much that I'm tweeting about it: Skip all permissions for Claude Cowork.
Use with care, brought to you by @dreamofabear
item.description:

item.title:
Hi! I'm here with *another launch*, it just happens to be extremely niche, nerdy, and probably only for a handful of people.
In the desktop app, Claude Cowork and Code now have a little Bluetooth AP
item.description:
Hi! I'm here with *another launch*, it just happens to be extremely niche, nerdy, and probably only for a handful of people.
In the desktop app, Claude Cowork and Code now have a little Bluetooth API for makers & developers, allowing you to build hardware devices that interact with Claude.
I, for

item.title:
Happy model launch day! Opus 4.7 is now available on all products and a significant step up from Opus 4.6. It's better at coding, computer use, finance, and general knowledge work.
🧵 I'll put the 5
item.description:
Happy model launch day! Opus 4.7 is now available on all products and a significant step up from Opus 4.6. It's better at coding, computer use, finance, and general knowledge work.
🧵 I'll put the 5 things I find most interesting in thread! https://t.co/JEsw0a6Mrs

item.title:
Today is a big day! We're launching a ~ new ~ version of Claude Code in the desktop app. It's been redesigned from the ground up for parallel work and is a lot faster.
It's been my main way to use Cl
item.description:
Today is a big day! We're launching a ~ new ~ version of Claude Code in the desktop app. It's been redesigned from the ground up for parallel work and is a lot faster.
It's been my main way to use Claude Code for the last few weeks. https://t.co/BOd6H8POLh

item.title: Now that the Mythos system card is out, I need to tell everyone that I'm mildly obsessed with its prose. https://t.co/JoFzF1z6VD
item.description: Now that the Mythos system card is out, I need to tell everyone that I'm mildly obsessed with its prose. https://t.co/JoFzF1z6VD

item.title: This was a fun chat, thanks for having me on! We talked a bunch about what products to build with AI and I think I nerd out over the opportunities with @mattturck for hours
item.description: This was a fun chat, thanks for having me on! We talked a bunch about what products to build with AI and I think I nerd out over the opportunities with @mattturck for hours

item.title: We released Claude Cowork as a research preview 12 weeks ago. Since then, millions of people have made it part of how they work - and hundreds of thousands more are trying it every week. I'm really op
item.description:
We released Claude Cowork as a research preview 12 weeks ago. Since then, millions of people have made it part of how they work - and hundreds of thousands more are trying it every week. I'm really optimistic about its ability to make people more productive.
Today, we're removing the "preview" labe

item.title: New connectors in Claude for everyday life
Built-in memory for Claude Managed Agents
